methodology: WARN Act mass layoff notices cross-referenced against Good Jobs First subsidy beneficiary index using 3-tier entity matching. Worker counts deduplicated by (company, date, workers) to prevent cross-state inflation.
caveats: WARN Act covers 100+ worker layoffs only
Clawback enforcement data requires FOIA — absence of evidence is not evidence of absence
FL WARN data embeds addresses in company names (~17.8% of rows)
